command: echo '=== 1. DOCKER PS (supabase/postgres) ===' && docker ps -a --format 'table {{.Names}}	{{.Image}}	{{.Status}}	{{.Ports}}' | grep -iE 'supabase|postgres|pgvector|NAME' && echo '' && echo '=== 2. PGVECTOR EXTENSION ===' && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -c "SELECT version();" 2>/dev/null && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -c "SELECT * FROM pg_available_extensions WHERE name = 'vector';" 2>/dev/null && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -c "SELECT extname, extversion FROM pg_extension WHERE extname = 'vector';" 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '=== 3. POSTGRES DATABASES ===' && docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -c '\l' 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '=== 4. /home/rag/.env ===' && (cat /home/rag/.env 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'PG_|SUPABASE|DATABASE|POSTGRES|VECTOR' || echo 'Нет PG/SUPABASE переменных') && echo '' && echo '=== 5. /home/rag/ CONTENTS ===' && (ls -la /home/rag/ 2>/dev/null || echo '/home/rag/ не найден') && echo '' && echo '=== 6. SUPABASE CHECK ===' && (docker ps -a --format '{{.Names}} {{.Image}}' | grep -i supabase || echo 'Supabase контейнеры не найдены') && (which supabase 2>/dev/null && supabase --version || echo 'supabase CLI не установлен') && echo '' && echo '=== 7. N8N DOCKER-COMPOSE ===' && cat /opt/n8n/docker-compose.yml 2>/dev/null | head -80 && echo '' && echo '=== 8. POSTGRES CREDENTIALS ===' && (cat /opt/n8n/.env 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'POSTGRES|PG_|DB_' || echo 'Нет PG переменных')
intent: Проверка Supabase, pgvector, PostgreSQL конфигурации и /home/rag/.env на VPS
